definitions.usage_context_en: A machine used in the home for a specific purpose
definitions.usage_context_es: Una máquina usada en el hogar para un propósito específico

definitions.usage_context_en: A place on the wall to connect electric plugs
definitions.usage_context_es: Un lugar en la pared para conectar enchufes eléctricos
definitions.usage_example: Plug the charger into the electrical outlet.
definitions.usage_example_es: Enchufa el cargador en el tomacorriente.

definitions.usage_example: A spoon is a common kitchen utensil.
definitions.usage_example_es: Una cuchara es un utensilio común de cocina.
definitions.usage_context_en: A tool used in the house, especially in the kitchen.
definitions.usage_context_es: A tool used in the house, especially in the kitchen.

definitions.usage_example: We bought new furniture for the living room.
definitions.usage_example_es: Compramos muebles nuevos para la sala.
definitions.usage_context_en: Large movable items in a room.
definitions.usage_context_es: Large movable items in a room.

definitions.usage_example: The sink is a bathroom fixture.
definitions.usage_example_es: El lavamanos es una instalación fija del baño.
definitions.usage_context_en: An item fixed in place in a building.
definitions.usage_context_es: An item fixed in place in a building.
